title: Filter
text: Filter Specifies the names of any external graphic filters that you want to use. Filter { A - Z } = FilterName Arguments A-Z —is the external filter you have defined with an image type of IA through IZ. FilterName —specifies the name of the external filter. Default value: None File section: [graphic filters] Description If you intend to write your own image filters for use with Microsoft Windows 95, Microsoft Windows NT, or Windows 2000, ensure that they are ALDUS Windows compliant. Export the functions defined in your filters using the _declspec (dllexport) convention. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
